string 2:
I apologize for imposing on you like this. Really, I have
but a small favor to ask...
{next}It's no trouble. Tell me how I can help.
{next}What kind of favor?
{next}Oh. In that case, I'm leaving.
I am sure you will find it a trifling matter.
It really is but a trifling matter...

Ah, while it may be a small matter, I fear I must insist you
see to it before you leave.
{next}So, what is it?
{next}I'm starting to get impatient...
{next}Forget it. I'm leaving.
Well, you see... The thing is...
Right. Of course. Well, to put it simply...
N-No, wait! Please, at least hear me out before you go.

Due in part to your request, I repaired UlforceVeedramon's
armor with Blue Chrondigizoit Metal.

Then I used the remaining Blue Chrondigizoit Metal to try 
my hand at what you would call a "ring."
{next}And?
{next}What kind of ring?
{next}For me?
Oh, well, according to a story I once heard...

Oh, the design was quite simple, although it was made from
precious Blue Digizoid.
...Why would you think that?

Among humans, rings are given to someone a person finds most
dear, are they not?
{next}That's right.
{next}Yes. So, who do you find most dear?
{next}And you're giving this one to me?
Then it is true...
Oh, I am sure you know...
...I truly cannot comprehend why you would think that.

I wanted to give this to Venusmon as thanks for the scarf.
Would humans find that odd?
{next}I wouldn't worry about that.
{next}Humans wouldn't give out a ring so quickly.
{next}Not me?
No? Well, if you say so, I shall trust your judgment.

I see... Yet, since I am not human, perhaps it is odd that I
should care what they think.

Let me make one thing perfectly clear. I have no intention
of giving you this ring.

So, would you please deliver this ring to Venusmon? No other
message will be necessary.
{next}You got it.
{next}You sure you don't wanna add a message?
{end}I refuse.

Then I shall be counting on you. Venusmon
should be in Central Town.

Blue Chrondigizoit Metal is quite precious, you see. 
The ring should speak for itself.
Oh... I see. Very well.
Will you deliver my ring to Venusmon?
{next}You got it.
{end}I refuse.
Then I shall be counting on you.
Oh... I see. Very well.

If Venusmon accepts the ring, that will mean my appreciation
has been made clear.

Neptunemon is giving me... a ring? But... I do not
understand.

This is precious Blue Chrondigizoit Metal, and the gift 
is so sudden. It must be significant.
{next}It's an expression of gratitude.
{next}It is. What do you think it means?
{next}I was told no message would be necessary.

Indeed. I cannot imagine Neptunemon would take thoughtless
action... Ah, I have it!

Yes, I must think about this... Why make me such a gift...?
Ah, I have it!

That makes it sound as if I am being tested... Ah, I have
it!

This must be a "Christmas present"! Neptunemon told me of
this human custom.

They exchange such gifts to show appreciation to those they
often interact with.

In that case... Here. Please deliver this medicine to
Neptunemon.
This is... medicine? Why would Venusmon give me medicine?
{next}To show appreciation in return.
{next}Venusmon saw the ring as a Christmas present.
{next}Because you didn't explain anything.

To show... appreciation? Well, at least that is proof that
Venusmon thinks highly of me.

I recall our speaking of that custom, but... I am impressed
Venusmon remembered.

And here I thought some things could be conveyed without
words...

Well, though I doubt Venusmon understood my expression of
gratitude, I am satisfied.

Why, I often fail to grasp my own feelings. Take that ring.
I made it without thinking.

Come to think of it, when I journeyed to the underworld, I
longed for Venusmon's medicine.

Keep it as a token of my appreciation. I am content with the
thought behind the gift.
Now, how else might I convey my feelings to Venusmon...?
